title: ballota acuta
intro: Ballota acuta is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), commonly known as narrow-leaved horehound. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ballota acuta include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
